hero.eyebrow: Hotel back-office software · works alongside any PMS
hero.headline: Everything your PMS doesn't do.
hero.sub: MyHotelOps is the operations layer that runs alongside your hotel's reservation system. Maintenance, events, vendors, signage, guest arrival — every part of running a boutique hotel that lives outside your PMS, in one place.
hero.personaLine: Built for owners, GMs, and managers — not for line staff fighting your reservation system.
hero.trialLine: 7-day free trial. No credit card. 10 GB included.

positioning.title: The category we're not in: your PMS.
positioning.body: We will never replace Cloudbeds, Mews, Opera, or Little Hotelier. We sit next to them and handle every operational surface they leave to spreadsheets and group chats — work orders, event proposals, vendor logins, signage on every TV, the printable arrival card in every room.

footer.tagline: The operations layer for boutique hotels.

signup.headline: Try MyHotelOps free for 7 days
signup.sub: Full access. No credit card. 10 GB of media included. We'll email you a verification code to confirm your address — takes under a minute end to end.

form.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, with at least one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one number, and one symbol.
form.noCardLine: No credit card required. 10 GB of media included.

verify.headline: Enter your {n}-digit code
verify.sub: We sent a code to {email}. It expires in {minutes} minutes.
verify.codeHint: {n} digits, from the email we just sent.
verify.resentRecently: A new code is on its way.

errors.missingFields: Email, password, your name, and hotel name are required.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.tooLong: That looks too long — keep names under 200 characters.
errors.consentRequired: Please agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to continue.
errors.rateLimitIp: Too many signup attempts from this network. Try again in a few minutes, or email {email}.
errors.rateLimitEmail: We’ve sent a code to {email} recently. Check your inbox or wait a few minutes before trying again.
errors.emailExists: {email} already has a MyHotelOps account. Log in or reset your password instead.
errors.internalError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.tempUnavailable: Signup is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.createAccountFailed: Something went wrong creating your account. Please try again.
errors.profileFailed: Something went wrong setting up your profile. Please try again.
errors.codeRequired: Enter the code from your email.
errors.codeExpired: That code has expired. Start over from /signup.
errors.codeTooManyAttempts: Too many wrong codes. Start over from /signup.
errors.codeMismatchOne: That code doesn’t match. 1 attempt left.
errors.codeMismatchMany: That code doesn’t match. {n} attempts left.
errors.codeMismatchFinal: That code doesn’t match. Start over from /signup.
errors.noPendingSignup: We don’t have a pending signup for that email. Start over from /signup.
errors.tooManyResends: Too many resends. Start over from /signup.
errors.resendCooldown: Hang on a moment before requesting another code.
errors.resendNeedsEmail: We need a valid email to resend the code.

destinations.title: Made for boutique hotels everywhere they cluster.
destinations.sub: Lisbon, Barcelona, Paris, Mexico City — the neighborhoods where independent and small-group hotels actually run. Local-currency billing, signup in your language, the same back-office stack everywhere.

otp.subject: Your MyHotelOps verification code: {code}
otp.intro: Your verification code for MyHotelOps is:
otp.instructions: Enter it on the signup page to finish creating {hotel}.
otp.ttl: The code expires in {minutes} minutes. If you didn’t request this, you can safely ignore this email.

welcome.subject: Welcome to MyHotelOps — your {days}-day trial is live
welcome.intro: {hotel} is set up on MyHotelOps. Your free trial gives you full access for {days} days — no credit card needed, {gb} GB of media included.
welcome.tryFirstTeam: Add your team from the Team page
welcome.tryFirstMedia: Upload your first floor plans / photos to Media
welcome.tryFirstWO: Create a work order to see the Kanban board in action

reminder.subjectOne: Your MyHotelOps trial ends in 1 day
reminder.subjectMany: Your MyHotelOps trial ends in {days} days
reminder.bodyOne: Your MyHotelOps trial for {hotel} ends in 1 day. Add a payment method to keep editing — your data stays where it is regardless.
reminder.bodyMany: Your MyHotelOps trial for {hotel} ends in {days} days. Add a payment method to keep editing — your data stays where it is regardless.

expired.subject: Your MyHotelOps trial has ended — your data is safe
expired.body: Your MyHotelOps trial for {hotel} ended today. We’ve moved your account to read-only and we’re holding all of your data — add a payment method any time to keep editing.
